promotions.title: 0 Handling Fee for the First Remittance to Chinese Mainland
promotions.highlight: 💸 Free first remittance to Chinese Mainland with funds received in as fast as 1 hour
promotions.description: Log in to the Airstar Bank App and use 'Remit to Chinese Mainland·WeRemit' to enjoy 0 handling fee on your first transfer to the Chinese Mainland. Funds can be received in as little as 1 hour, making transfers easier and cheaper.
promotions.quota: One-time offer per customer. Limited quota, first come, first served.

promotions.title: Activate Money Safe, Get a Pacific Coffee Voucher
promotions.highlight: ☕ Free HKD30 Pacific Coffee e-Cash Voucher when activating Money Safe feature
promotions.description: Experience Airstar Bank's latest anti-fraud feature by depositing any amount into a 'Money Safe' account. This HKMA-introduced feature provides stronger protection against scams while maintaining the same Savings/Time Deposit interest rates.
promotions.quota: Limited quota, first come, first served
promotions.cost: Any deposit amount into Money Safe account

promotions.title: Travel With Visa Flight Booking Cash Rebate
promotions.highlight: ✈️ Up to HKD800 cash rebate on eligible airline bookings
promotions.description: Visa cardholders can receive up to HKD800 cash rebate when booking air tickets with Air New Zealand, ANA, Ethiopian Airlines, EVA AIR or Singapore Airlines via their designated official Hong Kong or Macau websites. Rebate amount depends on transaction value.
promotions.quota: Maximum $800 cash rebate reward once per eligible Visa cardholder
promotions.cost: Minimum single transaction amount of HKD/MOP 4,000

promotions.title: Bank Securities Transfer 24/7 Service
promotions.highlight: 💰 24/7 instant securities transfers in HKD, USD, and CNY
promotions.description: Transfer securities instantly at any time with Airstar Bank's 24/7 support for multiple currencies including HKD, USD, and CNY. Enjoy immediate fund arrival for a seamless securities transfer experience.

promotions.title: Lifetime $0 Commissions on HK Stocks
promotions.highlight: 🏆 Zero commission fees on Hong Kong stocks forever
promotions.description: Trade Hong Kong stocks with $0 commission fees forever. This offer has no expiration for accounts that have obtained eligibility by opening during the promotion period, providing significant savings for active traders.
promotions.period: For accounts opened during promotion period
promotions.quota: Limited to accounts opened during the promotion period

promotions.title: Mobile Account Opening in 5 Minutes
promotions.highlight: ⏱️ Open an account in as fast as 5 minutes via mobile
promotions.description: Hong Kong residents and visitors can open an Airstar Bank account through their mobile phone in as little as 5 minutes. Enjoy 24/7 online banking services with a streamlined digital onboarding process.

promotions.title: No Account Management Fees
promotions.highlight: 💲 Zero account management fees with no minimum deposit requirement
promotions.description: Enjoy free banking services with no account management fees and no minimum deposit balance requirements at Airstar Bank. Access all banking services without worrying about monthly maintenance fees.

promotions.title: Personal Loan with Personalized Stellar APR
promotions.highlight: 💼 Loan amount up to 12x monthly salary with personalized APR
promotions.description: Apply for a personal loan with personalized APR ranging from 7.43% to 35.05%. Get a loan amount of up to 12 times your monthly salary or HKD1,000,000 (whichever is lower) with approval and disbursement in as fast as 5 minutes.

promotions.title: Multi-Currency Savings Account
promotions.highlight: 🌍 Multi-currency savings with no minimum balance requirement
promotions.description: Open a multi-currency savings account with no minimum balance requirement. Manage multiple currencies in a single account for convenient international money management and transfers.

promotions.title: Flexible Time Deposit Placement
promotions.highlight: 🕒 24/7 time deposit placement with flexible tenors
promotions.description: Place time deposits anytime with Airstar Bank's 24/7 service. Choose from flexible tenors to suit your financial needs and earn competitive interest rates on your deposits.

promotions.title: Multi-Currency Transfer Options
promotions.highlight: ⚡ Instant transfers 24/7 via FPS in multiple currencies
promotions.description: Transfer funds instantly 24/7 using mobile numbers, email addresses, or account numbers with support for multiple currencies including HKD, USD, and CNY. Benefit from Hong Kong's Faster Payment System (FPS) for immediate transfers.

promotions.title: Low-Cost US Stock Trading
promotions.highlight: 💵 US stock trading for just US$1.99 per order
promotions.description: Trade US stocks with Airstar Bank for a low cost of just US$1.99 per order. Access a wide range of US stocks and ETFs with competitive pricing regardless of trade size.

promotions.title: Fractional Shares Investing
promotions.highlight: 🧩 Invest with as little as 1 HK share or US$5 for US stocks
promotions.description: Start investing with minimal capital using Airstar Bank's fractional shares feature. Buy as little as 1 share for Hong Kong stocks or invest with just US$5 for US stocks, making premium securities accessible to all investors.
promotions.cost: As low as 1 HK share or US$5

promotions.title: Money Safe Anti-Fraud Protection
promotions.highlight: 🔒 Enhanced protection against fraud while earning interest
promotions.description: Money Safe feature provides enhanced protection against fraud losses. Secure your funds while still earning Savings or Time Deposit rates, with funds only unlockable through in-person appointment.

promotions.title: eM+ High Yield Account (Libra Savings) up to 2.0% p.a. Interest Rate
promotions.highlight: 💰 Earn up to 2.0% p.a. on your deposits
promotions.description: Customers who successfully upgrade to eM+ High Yield Account (Libra Savings) through the AlipayHK App can enjoy up to 2.0% p.a. interest rate. The 2.0% rate is applicable to deposit amounts between HKD 200,000 - 800,000, while deposits up to HKD 200,000 earn 0.5% p.a.
promotions.quota: Available for all customers who upgrade through AlipayHK App

promotions.title: SME Loan Cash Rebate Promotion
promotions.highlight: 💵 Up to HKD 100,000 cash rebate on first drawdown
promotions.description: SME customers who take out a business loan can enjoy up to HKD 100,000 cash rebate on their first loan drawdown. This is a limited-time promotion for small and medium enterprises seeking business financing.
promotions.cost: Must take out and draw down a business loan

promotions.title: Multi-Currency Savings Account Upgrade
promotions.highlight: ⏱️ Open an account in as fast as 3 minutes
promotions.description: Ant Bank offers a streamlined account opening process that can be completed in as fast as 3 minutes. This quick and convenient service is available for various accounts including investment accounts.

promotions.title: Ant Bank Investment Fund Platform Zero Fee Offer
promotions.highlight: 🔄 Zero subscription and redemption fees for fund investments
promotions.description: Enjoy fee waivers on fund subscription (from 0%) and redemptions on Ant Bank's new investment fund platform. The platform features curated funds from top global fund companies with no platform fees.

promotions.title: Insurance Products with Annual Rate up to 3.6%
promotions.highlight: 📈 Insurance products with returns up to 3.6% p.a.
promotions.description: Ant Bank (Hong Kong) offers insurance products with potential returns of up to 3.6% p.a. These insurance products are from YF Life Insurance International Ltd. and are distributed by Ant Bank as a registered agent.
promotions.quota: Available to eligible customers in Hong Kong

promotions.title: Time Deposit with Early Withdrawal Without Penalty
promotions.highlight: 🕒 Customizable deposit periods with low minimum deposit
promotions.description: Ant Bank offers time deposits with customizable deposit periods, zero penalty for early withdrawal, a low minimum deposit of just HKD 1, and support for both HKD and USD deposits. This provides flexible savings options for customers.

promotions.title: Direct Third-Party Transfer from Libra Savings
promotions.highlight: ↗️ Transfer directly to third-party accounts with daily limit up to HKD 1 million
promotions.description: Experience enhanced functionality that allows direct transfers from Libra Savings to third-party accounts. The daily transfer limit has been increased to up to HKD 1 million, providing greater flexibility for managing your finances.

promotions.title: SecureLock Service
promotions.highlight: 🔒 Enhanced protection for your deposits
promotions.description: Ant Bank has launched SecureLock Service, an anti-fraud measure from the Hong Kong Monetary Authority. It allows customers to lock reserve funds which cannot be transferred through any channels, reducing the risk of fraud while still earning interest.
promotions.quota: Available to all customers with Libra Savings and savings accounts

promotions.title: Installment Loan with Fast Approval
promotions.highlight: 💳 Simple application with fast approval and disbursement
promotions.description: Ant Bank's installment loan offers flexible loan amounts, low interest rates, simple application process, and fast approval with immediate fund disbursement. The service is designed to meet customers' financing needs quickly and efficiently.

promotions.title: Personal Loan with Revolving Credit
promotions.highlight: 🔄 Revolving credit facility with flexible withdrawals
promotions.description: Ant Bank's personal loan offers a revolving credit facility that allows flexible withdrawals and immediate fund disbursement. The loan features easy financial management, simple application, transparent fees, and flexible withdrawal options.

promotions.title: Fund Investment with HKD 1 Minimum
promotions.highlight: 💲 Invest in funds with as little as HKD 1
promotions.description: Ant Bank's fund investment platform allows customers to invest in quality funds from top-tier fund companies including JP Morgan, Allianz, GF, and Huaxia with a minimum investment of just HKD 1. Application is document-free with account opening possible in as fast as 1 minute.

promotions.title: Securities Trading Commission-Free Promotion
promotions.highlight: 🏆 Trade stocks with zero commission fees!
promotions.description: Ant Bank offers zero commission on securities trading, allowing customers to trade Hong Kong and US stocks more cost-effectively. This promotion is part of their one-stop securities trading service with bank-level wealth management.
promotions.cost: Free, subject to terms and conditions

promotions.title: Fixed Deposit No Penalty for Early Withdrawal
promotions.highlight: ⏱️ Open your account in as fast as 3 minutes!
promotions.description: Ant Bank offers a fast account opening experience that can take as little as 3 minutes. This feature makes it convenient for customers to open investment accounts quickly without income proof documents.

promotions.title: Fastee Secure Service
promotions.highlight: 🔒 Enhanced security for your deposits with anti-fraud measures!
promotions.description: Ant Bank has launched the Fastee Secure Service, an anti-fraud measure initiated by the Hong Kong Monetary Authority. The service allows customers to lock spare deposits that cannot be transferred out through any channels, reducing the risk of fraud while still earning interest.

promotions.title: One-Stop Securities Trading Platform
promotions.highlight: 🌎 Trade Hong Kong and US stocks on a single platform!
promotions.description: Ant Bank offers a one-stop trading platform connecting Hong Kong and US stock markets, providing global investment opportunities. The platform gives access to Hong Kong stocks, US stocks, ETFs and other global investment solutions.
promotions.cost: Trading fees apply as per service charge schedule

promotions.title: Open an account in 5 minutes
promotions.highlight: ⏱️ Open an account in just 5 minutes with HKID card and mobile number
promotions.description: Simplified account opening process that allows customers to open an account in as little as 5 minutes. Only requires Hong Kong identity card and mobile phone number, making the process faster than preparing a cup of coffee.
promotions.quota: Hong Kong identity card holders aged 18 or above, non-US persons only

promotions.title: Start Saving from HKD 1
promotions.highlight: 💰 Start saving with just HKD 1
promotions.description: Flexible savings plan allowing customers to start saving with as little as HKD 1. Designed to help customers save for future adventures or personal milestones with minimal barriers to entry.

promotions.title: Local Transfers in Multiple Currencies
promotions.highlight: 🌐 Transfer funds locally in HKD, CNY and USD
promotions.description: Service allowing customers to make instant transfers in multiple currencies (HKD, CNY, USD) to other local accounts. Designed to make foreign exchange simpler and more accessible for everyday use.

promotions.title: Global Remittance Service
promotions.highlight: 🌍 Send money globally from your smartphone
promotions.description: International remittance service allowing customers to send money worldwide directly from their mobile device. Features real-time exchange rates for currency conversion and integration with online payment systems for cashless spending abroad.

promotions.title: Deposit Protection up to HKD 800,000
promotions.highlight: 🛡️ Deposits protected up to HKD 800,000
promotions.description: As a member of Hong Kong's Deposit Protection Scheme, Fusion Bank provides protection for eligible deposits up to a maximum of HKD 800,000 per depositor. This offers customers security and peace of mind for their savings.

promotions.title: Foreign Currency Exchange Promotion
promotions.highlight: 💱 Special rates for foreign currency exchange
promotions.description: A special promotion offering enhanced rates for foreign currency exchange transactions. The offer focuses on USD, HKD, and CNY exchange with no upper limit on transaction amounts.

promotions.title: Flash Monday High-Interest HKD Time Deposit
promotions.highlight: ⚡ High interest rate HKD time deposits on Mondays
promotions.description: Special high-interest time deposit offer available on Mondays only. The 'Flash Monday' promotion provides enhanced interest rates for HKD deposits made during the promotional period.

promotions.title: Savings Interest Plus
promotions.highlight: 📈 Enhanced interest rates on savings accounts
promotions.description: Special promotion offering increased interest rates on regular savings accounts. The offer provides customers with better returns on their deposits without needing to lock funds in time deposits.

promotions.title: Foreign Currency Time Deposit Interest Rate Boost
promotions.highlight: 🔼 Enhanced interest rates for foreign currency time deposits
promotions.description: Special promotion offering boosted interest rates for time deposits in foreign currencies. Available for customers exchanging currencies and placing them in time deposits.

promotions.title: liviSave Preferential Savings Rate
promotions.highlight: 💰 Earn preferential savings rate with liviSave
promotions.description: Customers can grow their money with a preferential savings rate when they add funds to liviSave. No minimum deposit is required to enjoy this rate offer. Terms and conditions apply.

promotions.title: liviSave No Fees Account
promotions.highlight: 🆓 No fees and no minimum deposit required
promotions.description: Open a liviSave account with no fees and no minimum deposit balance requirements. The account caters to both paying and saving needs with complete flexibility.

promotions.title: Fast and Free FPS Transfers
promotions.highlight: ⚡ Fast and free transfers via FPS anytime
promotions.description: Make instant, fee-free transfers to anyone at any time using the Faster Payment System (FPS). Transfer money quickly and conveniently through the livi app.

promotions.title: Secure QR Payment System
promotions.highlight: 📱 Fast and secure QR payments across Hong Kong
promotions.description: Make payments using QR codes at merchants throughout Hong Kong. Enjoy a simple, fast, and secure shopping experience with livi's QR payment functionality.

promotions.title: 100% Online Account Opening
promotions.highlight: 📲 Open an account completely online, anytime and anywhere
promotions.description: Open a livi bank account 100% online through the mobile app. The process is quick and easy with no complicated documentation required. Start banking immediately from anywhere.

promotions.title: livi Rewards Program
promotions.highlight: 🎁 Exclusive rewards for everyday transactions
promotions.description: livi Rewards program offers various benefits and rewards for customers. The 'Happiness' and 'livi Rewards is here' mentions indicate an active rewards program that provides benefits for using livi services.

promotions.title: Pay your tax with Mox Credit Card, split and earn cash reward
promotions.highlight: 💰 Earn up to HKD500 cash reward for tax payments with installment plan
promotions.description: Pay your tax bill with Mox Credit Card and apply for Instalment during the promotional period. Split the payment while earning up to HKD500 in cash rewards to ease tax season pressure.

promotions.title: Tax Season Instant Loan with Low APR
promotions.highlight: 💸 APR as low as 1.18% on Instant Loan with cash rewards up to HKD10,888
promotions.description: Special Tax Season Instant Loan offering APR as low as 1.18% with personalized quotation and instant disbursement. Earn up to HKD10,888 cash reward for successful application of designated Instant Loans.

promotions.title: Keeta Exclusive Flash Sale
promotions.highlight: ⚡️ Up to HKD80 off when ordering on Keeta with Mox Card
promotions.description: Order from Keeta using a Mox Card and enjoy a Mox exclusive discount of up to HKD20 off per order, saving up to HKD80 for the whole month. Additional surprise vouchers and welcome rewards are available.

promotions.title: Mox x Xiaomi Flagship Camera Phone Offer
promotions.highlight: 📷📱 Up to 7% total cash rewards at Xiaomi + 0% interest installments
promotions.description: Shop at mi.com or any Xiaomi Store with Mox Credit Card to earn up to 5% extra cash rebate (capped at HKD450) plus 0% interest installments for up to 12 months. Standard up to 2% Unlimited CashBack also applies, totaling up to 7% cash rewards.

promotions.title: Mox Journey from Scratch Promotion
promotions.highlight: 💥 Complete missions to scratch & win rewards worth up to HKD8,888
promotions.description: Complete any of five simple challenges to receive a Mox Scratch Card with instant prize reveal. Finish more challenges to multiply chances to win the top prize of HKD8,888 (HKD8,000 in Solana + HKD888 cash reward).

promotions.title: Indulge and Grow Bonus Deposit Promotion
promotions.highlight: 🏦 Chance to win a 1-month 'free lunch' with bonus deposits
promotions.description: Deposit your bonus into Mox to earn great interest and get a chance to win a 1-month 'free lunch'. Each HKD10,000 deposit earns one entry into the lucky draw, with more deposits increasing winning chances.
promotions.cost: Minimum HKD10,000 deposit for one entry

promotions.title: Mox x csl Best-in-Town Exclusive Plan Offer
promotions.highlight: 🤳 Get up to HKD1,380 rebates + free NowTV Pass with csl plan
promotions.description: Sign up for a new csl plan or renew an existing one with Mox Credit Card autopay to receive an HKD180 monthly fee rebate and a free Now TV beIN SPORTS Super Pack 1-Month Pass valued at HKD188.
promotions.cost: New plan or renewal with Mox Credit Card autopay

promotions.title: Travel Pick & Go Eggstra Care+ Promotion
promotions.highlight: ✈️ 🆓 FREE add-on coverage with Travel Pick & Go insurance
promotions.description: Apply for Travel Pick & Go insurance during the promotional period to receive 1 FREE add-on coverage. This helps protect your trip from financial stress caused by unexpected events.
promotions.cost: Travel Pick & Go insurance purchase required

promotions.title: MOXTRAVEL New Customer Welcome Offer
promotions.highlight: ✈️ Earn up to 28,500 miles through spending and saving
promotions.description: New customers who enter invitation code 'MOXTRAVEL' when opening a Mox account and applying for a Mox Credit Card can earn up to 28,500 miles through spending and saving activities - enough for a round-trip flight to Asia.
promotions.cost: Account opening with specific code required

promotions.title: Samsung S26 Series Exclusive Offer at The Club
promotions.highlight: 📱 HKD100 off Samsung S26 series at The Club with promo code
promotions.description: Spend HKD1,800 or more on The Club with your Mox Credit Card and enter promo code CLUBMOX2026 to enjoy an instant HKD100 discount on the new Samsung S26 series. This is in addition to earning up to 2% Unlimited CashBack.

promotions.title: Uber Taxi Ride Offer
promotions.highlight: 🚕 HKD10 off each Uber Taxi ride, up to HKD90 total
promotions.description: Pay for Uber Taxi rides with your Mox Card during the promotional period and enjoy HKD10 off each ride per month. Claim the exclusive promo code to start saving on travel, family visits, and airport transfers.
promotions.cost: Uber Taxi ride payment with Mox Card

promotions.title: XM1500MOX New Customer Welcome Offer
promotions.highlight: 💰 Earn up to HKD1,500 cash reward plus 0-requirement 2% CashBack
promotions.description: New customers who use invitation code '1500MOX' to open a Mox account and apply for a Mox Credit Card can earn up to HKD1,500 in cash rewards by meeting spending requirements. Additionally, unlock 2% Unlimited CashBack or HKD4=1 mile with no balance requirement for a limited time.
promotions.cost: Account opening with specific code and spending requirements

promotions.title: MOXSMART Double Rewards Welcome Offer
promotions.highlight: 💸 20% cash rebate from spending across 5 merchants + savings rewards
promotions.description: New Mox customers can enter invitation code 'MOXSMART' when signing up and spend on selected merchants including HKTVmall, foodpanda, Uber, Keeta, or Taobao to earn 20% cash rebate. Additional rewards from savings are also included.
promotions.cost: Account opening with specific code and spending at selected merchants

promotions.title: Trip.com Year-round Exclusive Offer
promotions.highlight: ✈️ Up to 8% off Trip.com bookings + up to 2% Unlimited CashBack
promotions.description: Enjoy exclusive discounts of up to 8% on Trip.com bookings when paying with Mox Credit Card. Additionally, earn up to 2% Unlimited CashBack on these transactions, maximizing savings on travel bookings throughout the year.
promotions.cost: Trip.com booking with Mox Credit Card

promotions.title: Personal Accident Cushion Premium Rebate
promotions.highlight: ⚡️ Up to 2 months premium rebate with Personal Accident Cushion
promotions.description: Purchase Personal Accident Cushion insurance during the promotional period to enjoy up to 2 months of premium rebate. This doubles the standard reward offering enhanced value for comprehensive accident protection.
promotions.cost: Personal Accident Cushion insurance purchase required

promotions.title: Payroll with Mox Bonus
promotions.highlight: 💸 Top up 1.5% p.a. on savings & Unlimited 2% CashBack on Mox Credit
promotions.description: Set up payroll with Mox to receive 1.5% p.a. additional interest on your savings and unlock Unlimited 2% CashBack on Mox Credit Card spending. A comprehensive reward for routing your salary through Mox.

promotions.title: Mission Bonus Rate
promotions.highlight: 🚀 Stack wins, stack rates – up to 3.5% p.a. on deposits
promotions.description: Complete various missions to boost your savings interest rate up to 3.5% p.a. on your deposits. Stack multiple accomplishments to maximize your interest earnings.

promotions.title: Mox Referral Programme
promotions.highlight: 🎉 Earn HKD300 cash reward for each successful referral
promotions.description: Share your referral code with friends to invite them to open a Mox account. When your friend completes the account opening process within 15 days, successfully applies for a Mox Credit Card within 30 days, and completes HKD1,000 in eligible spending within 30 days after card approval, both you and your friend will each receive HKD300 cash reward.
promotions.quota: No limit on number of referrals

promotions.title: Mox Zone on The Club
promotions.highlight: 🛍️ Exclusive year-round deals on The Club platform
promotions.description: Access Mox Zone on The Club platform to enjoy exclusive year-round deals and discounts. Special offers available only to Mox customers for enhanced shopping value throughout the year.

promotions.title: Mox Asia Miles Time Deposit
promotions.highlight: ✈️ Earn Asia Miles with Time Deposit placement
promotions.description: Place a Time Deposit with Mox and earn Asia Miles instead of traditional interest. Special promotion for travel enthusiasts looking to build miles balances through their savings.

promotions.title: FlexiBoost Savings
promotions.highlight: 💰 Unmatched flexibility and competitive rates with FlexiBoost
promotions.description: Enjoy flexible savings with competitive interest rates through the FlexiBoost savings program. Combines the benefits of high-interest accounts with the flexibility of regular savings.

promotions.title: New FX Users Reward
promotions.highlight: 💱 Up to HKD175 cash rewards for new FX users
promotions.description: New FX users can receive up to HKD175 in cash rewards when performing foreign exchange transactions through Mox. Special incentive for customers trying the FX service for the first time.

promotions.title: Mox Credit Card Miles Rewards Scheme
promotions.highlight: ✈️ HKD4=1 mile + 0 Limits + 0% FX Fees on all spending
promotions.description: Unlock your next journey with Mox Credit Card offering HKD4=1 Asia Miles on all spending with no limits and 0% foreign exchange fees. Permanent feature for travel enthusiasts to maximize mile earning on everyday transactions.

promotions.title: Unlimited CashBack with Mox Credit Card
promotions.highlight: 💳 Up to 2% Unlimited CashBack on all spending
promotions.description: Enjoy up to 2% Unlimited CashBack on all spending with the Mox Credit Card with no category restrictions or caps. A permanent feature allowing customers to earn rewards on every purchase.

promotions.title: MOXHKT25 HKT Shopping Rewards
promotions.highlight: 🛍️ HKD1,400 Cash Rewards when shopping at HKT
promotions.description: Shop at HKT stores or online platforms and pay with your Mox Credit Card to earn HKD1,400 in Cash Rewards. Special promotion for telecommunications and electronics shopping.

promotions.title: Instant Interest on Time Deposits
promotions.highlight: ⚡ Instantly earn interest without waiting periods
promotions.description: Say goodbye to waiting periods for interest calculations. Mox offers instant interest earnings on savings deposits, crediting interest immediately rather than at month or term end. A permanent feature enhancing savings value.

promotions.title: MOXDEPO Time Deposit Welcome Offer
promotions.highlight: 💰 Earn HKD2,500 cash rewards with Time Deposit
promotions.description: Open a Mox Account using invitation code 'MOXDEPO', complete account opening within 15 days, place a Time Deposit of at least HKD250,000 within 7 days, and maintain the balance until the end of the Hold Fund Period to earn HKD2,500 cash rewards.
promotions.quota: New customers who haven't held any Mox Account in 12 months
promotions.cost: Minimum Time Deposit of HKD250,000 required

promotions.title: MOXBILL26 HKT Bill Payment Offer
promotions.highlight: 💰 Earn HKD1,200 cash rewards + up to 2% Unlimited CashBack
promotions.description: Pay your HKT bills and earn HKD1,200 cash rewards plus up to 2% Unlimited CashBack. Specific requirements and eligibility period are not detailed in the source.

promotions.title: CLUBLINK New Customer Welcome Offer
promotions.highlight: 💰 Enjoy rewards worth up to HKD1,400
promotions.description: Open a Mox Account with invitation code 'CLUBLINK' to enjoy rewards worth up to HKD1,400. Specific requirements and rewards breakdown are not fully detailed in the source.

promotions.title: 0% Interest Instant Clear
promotions.highlight: 💳 0% interest* on Instant Clear for credit card balance transfers
promotions.description: Clear your external credit card bills from other banks or financial institutions with Instant Clear and save as much as 94% interest charges. The process takes only a few minutes and offers 0% interest options.

promotions.title: Year-round offers with Mox Credit Card
promotions.highlight: 🎁 Exclusive offers with Unlimited CashBack or Miles
promotions.description: Enjoy fabulous year-round offers when using your Mox Credit Card at partner merchants. Earn Unlimited CashBack or Unlimited Miles on all your spending throughout the year.
promotions.quota: Available to all Mox Credit Card holders

promotions.title: Daily Interest Calculation
promotions.highlight: 💸 Interest on savings calculated and credited to your account daily
promotions.description: Mox calculates and credits interest to your Mox Account daily, allowing your savings to grow faster. This is a permanent feature of Mox accounts with no end date or special eligibility requirements.

promotions.title: Mox Invest Trading Services
promotions.highlight: 📈 Trade HK and US stocks including fractional shares with low fees
promotions.description: Mox is the first digital bank allowing customers to trade in both HK and US stocks, including fractional shares. Invest with low fees in stocks and funds with the security and advantages of a bank.

promotions.title: USD Savings Rate
promotions.highlight: 💵 1% p.a. interest on USD savings with no strings attached
promotions.description: Starting 1 March 2025, enjoy 1% p.a. interest on your USD savings with no strings attached. Interest is calculated and credited to your account daily, allowing you to watch your savings grow every day.

promotions.title: Mox Credit FPS Payments
promotions.highlight: ⚡ Pay with Mox Credit via FPS for transfers and bill payments
promotions.description: Use your Mox Credit to make payments via FPS, making daily transfers or paying bills effortlessly. This feature is automatically unlocked when your credit limit is approved, with no extra documents required.

promotions.title: Account Opening in 3 Minutes
promotions.highlight: ⏱️ Open a bank account in as fast as 3 minutes
promotions.description: Fast digital account opening process for new customers. Account can be opened in as little as 3 minutes when no additional information or documents are required.

promotions.title: No Minimum Balance Requirement
promotions.highlight: 💰 Maintain your account with no minimum balance required
promotions.description: Customers can open and maintain their accounts without any minimum balance requirements. This offers flexibility for all types of customers regardless of their financial situation.

promotions.title: 24/7 Full Banking Capability
promotions.highlight: ⏰ Access banking services anytime, day or night
promotions.description: Round-the-clock access to banking services through the mobile app. Customers can perform banking transactions at any time without time restrictions.

promotions.title: Services for Residents and Visitors in Hong Kong
promotions.highlight: 🌏 Banking services available to visitors physically present in Hong Kong
promotions.description: Banking services offered to both Hong Kong residents and visiting customers who are physically present in Hong Kong. Allows visitors to access banking services while in Hong Kong.
promotions.quota: Visitors physically present in Hong Kong

promotions.title: Hong Kong Stocks Trading with 0 Platform Fee
promotions.highlight: 💲 USD0.012 per share commission for US stocks with minimum USD7.88 per trade
promotions.description: Competitive fee structure for US stock trading with USD0.012 per share commission and a minimum fee of USD7.88 per transaction. No platform fees charged for US stock trading.
promotions.cost: USD0.012 per share, minimum USD7.88 per trade

promotions.title: Extended US Stock Trading Hours
promotions.highlight: 📈 Extended 16-hour trading window for US stocks
promotions.description: Access to extended US stock trading hours covering pre-market, regular market, and after-hours sessions. Provides flexibility for trading US stocks across a 16-hour window.

promotions.title: Free Level 1 Hong Kong Stock Market Data
promotions.highlight: 📊 Free real-time Level 1 market data with unlimited quotes
promotions.description: Free access to real-time Level 1 market data for stocks with unlimited quote requests. Available to customers who have activated stock investment services.
promotions.quota: All investment account holders with activated stock services

promotions.title: Discounted Fund Subscription Fees
promotions.highlight: 🔄 0% subscription and redemption fees on money market funds
promotions.description: Zero fees for subscription and redemption of money market funds. Customers can subscribe to money market funds with as little as HK$100 or US$20.

promotions.title: Same-Day Money Market Fund Redemption
promotions.highlight: ⚡ Get your money back as soon as same day when redeeming money market funds
promotions.description: Fast redemption service for money market funds with funds credited to the customer's bank account as quickly as the same day. Provides high liquidity for money market investments.

promotions.title: Low Investment Threshold for Money Market Funds
promotions.highlight: 🔍 Start investing with as little as USD 20 or HKD 100
promotions.description: Ping An Digital Bank offers low entry thresholds for money market fund investments. Customers can start investing with as little as USD 20 for USD-denominated funds or HKD 100 for HKD-denominated funds.

promotions.title: WeLab Global Wallet Best Exchange Rates
promotions.highlight: 💱 Best FX rates compared to 28 retail banks in Hong Kong
promotions.description: WeLab Bank offers the best foreign exchange rates in town based on comparison with 28 retail banks in Hong Kong. Exchange currencies at cost price with no additional markup on the exchange rate.

promotions.title: WeLab Global Wallet $0 Foreign Currency Transaction Fee
promotions.highlight: 💳 Enjoy $0 foreign currency transaction fee for 10 supported currencies
promotions.description: When using the WeLab Global Wallet Debit Card for overseas transactions, customers can enjoy $0 foreign currency transaction fee for 10 supported currencies including JPY, USD, CNY, AUD, GBP, EUR, SGD, CAD, CHF and NZD.

promotions.title: Easter Lucky Draw Promotion
promotions.highlight: 🎁 Chance to win 300 prizes including HKD1,000 travel vouchers
promotions.description: For every qualifying transaction with WeLab Global Wallet Debit Card or currency exchange, customers earn lucky draw entries. The more transactions made, the higher the chance of winning from 300 available prizes.
promotions.cost: At least one eligible card transaction during the reward calculation period

promotions.title: Up to 3% Overseas Spending Cashback
promotions.highlight: 💸 Up to 3% cash rebate on overseas spending with WeLab Global Wallet Debit Card
promotions.description: From April 1 to May 10, 2026, eligible cardholders can enjoy up to 0.2% cash rebate on local spending and up to 3% cash rebate on overseas spending using the WeLab Global Wallet Debit Card. Rebate capped at HKD 50 per eligible transaction.

promotions.title: 2-in-1 Welcome Rewards April 2026
promotions.highlight: 💰 New customers can enjoy rewards worth approximately HKD 5,000
promotions.description: New customers who open an account using the referral code 'WL5000' can enjoy dual welcome offers: up to 4% p.a. time deposit interest rate plus HKD 4,000 fund investment cash reward, totaling approximately HKD 5,000 in rewards.
promotions.cost: Meet minimum deposit requirements for time deposit and fund investment

promotions.title: First-time Foreign Currency Exchange Rebate
promotions.highlight: 💱 HKD 50 cash rebate for first-time currency exchange
promotions.description: First-time foreign currency exchange customers who successfully exchange HKD 20,000 or above in a single transaction for one of 10 specified popular currencies can enjoy an HKD 50 cash rebate.
promotions.quota: Limited quota, first-come-first-served, one rebate per eligible customer

promotions.title: $0 Fund Subscription and Switching Fee
promotions.highlight: 💵 Seek returns similar to time deposits without lock-in periods
promotions.description: WeLab Money Plus is a money market fund offered through WeLab Bank's self-selection fund service with same-day settlement. It aims to provide returns similar to time deposits without requiring lock-in periods.

promotions.title: Digital Wealth Advisory Service
promotions.highlight: 🤖 AI-powered personalized investment advice for portfolio management
promotions.description: WeLab Bank's Digital Wealth Advisory service provides personalized fund portfolio recommendations based on customers' investment goals. The system automatically invests monthly according to set preferences and provides progress alerts.

promotions.title: Trip.com Discount with WeLab Global Wallet Debit Card
promotions.highlight: ✈️ Up to HKD 500 discount on Trip.com bookings
promotions.description: During the promotion period, customers can enjoy up to HKD 500 discount when booking specified products on Trip.com website or mobile app with the WeLab Global Wallet Debit Card. Requires entering a designated promo code at checkout.

promotions.title: Tesla Customer Personal Instalment Loan Offer
promotions.highlight: 🚘 Tesla customers enjoy personal instalment loan with APR as low as 4.55%
promotions.description: Tesla customers who successfully open a WeLab Bank account or apply for a loan with the promo code 'TESLA5' and complete designated tasks can enjoy a personal instalment loan with an annualized percentage rate as low as 4.55%. Maximum loan amount up to HKD 1,500,000 or 18x monthly salary.
promotions.quota: Limited quota, first-come-first-served, Tesla customers only

promotions.title: Extra Lucky Draw Chances for New Customers
promotions.highlight: 🎲 New customers receive 50 additional lucky draw entries
promotions.description: New customers receive 50 additional lucky draw entries for the Easter Lucky Draw promotion when using the Global Wallet Debit Card for overseas spending. They'll also enjoy 3% cash rebate on overseas spending and automatic participation in the lucky draw.

promotions.title: Personal Loan Cash Rebate Offer
promotions.highlight: 💵 Up to HKD 23,888 cash rebate for successful personal loan application
promotions.description: WeLab Bank customers who successfully apply for a personal loan with an approved loan amount of HKD 150,001 or above and a repayment period of 24 months or more, and draw down the loan within 7 days of approval, can enjoy a cash rebate of up to HKD 23,888.
promotions.cost: Minimum loan amount of HKD 150,001 with 24+ months repayment period

promotions.title: WeLab Bank Personal Loan R Friends Referral Program
promotions.highlight: 👥 Earn HKD800 for each successful personal loan referral
promotions.description: WeLab Bank customers can refer friends or relatives to apply for a WeLab Bank personal loan using their referral code. For each successful referral who draws down the loan within 7 days of approval, the referrer receives HKD800 cash reward.
promotions.quota: Maximum 10 successful referrals (HKD8,000) per customer during promotion period

promotions.title: 0.1% Monthly Fund Platform Fee
promotions.highlight: 💼 Low 0.1% monthly fee instead of traditional subscription fees
promotions.description: WeLab Bank charges a uniform monthly fee of 0.1% based on the total value of selected funds, helping customers save nearly 85% in transaction fees compared to traditional subscription fee models. This allows for unlimited trading and portfolio adjustments.
promotions.cost: 0.1% monthly platform fee based on fund value

promotions.title: ZA Bank 0% Fund Subscription Fee Offer
promotions.highlight: 💰 Zero subscription fees on ALL funds with no cap
promotions.description: ZA Bank retail banking users who have activated fund trading services can enjoy 0% subscription fees on all funds with no cap, allowing 100% of your money to go into the market. Redemption fee waivers are also included.
promotions.quota: All retail banking customers with active fund trading services

promotions.title: Customer Referral Program - Referrer Rewards
promotions.highlight: 🤝 Earn up to HKD 90,000 by referring friends to open accounts
promotions.description: Refer friends to open ZA Bank accounts to earn cash rewards. The promotion includes a leaderboard with prizes for the top 20 referrers in each of 9 phases, with rewards for both the referrer and the referred friend.
promotions.quota: Top 20 referrers per phase eligible for leaderboard rewards

promotions.title: New Customer Welcome Reward and StockBack Bonus
promotions.highlight: 🎁 Rewards worth HKD 2,026 for new customers via referral
promotions.description: New customers who open an account using a referral code can receive a package of rewards worth HKD 2,026 including fund holding rebate coupons (HKD 780 + HKD 20), stock cash rebate coupons, currency exchange discount, and overseas remittance cashback.
promotions.quota: New customers who open account with referral code

promotions.title: StockBack x ZA Card Reward Program
promotions.highlight: 💰 Spend to earn stock rewards with up to 1.5% stock rebates on purchases
promotions.description: When using ZA Card for eligible transactions of at least HKD 10, customers can select one stock from six options for a 1.5% rebate of their purchase amount. StockBack rewards must be claimed within 48 hours of transaction.
promotions.quota: Must maintain valid investment account within 90 days to receive rewards
promotions.cost: Minimum spend of HKD 10 per transaction

promotions.title: Year-Round Travel Offers with ZA Card
promotions.highlight: ✈️ Special discounts for travelers using ZA Card
promotions.description: ZA Bank offers year-round travel promotions for customers using their ZA Card. These offers provide special discounts and benefits for travel-related purchases.
promotions.cost: Must use ZA Card for travel-related purchases

promotions.title: Multi-Currency Savings Account
promotions.highlight: 🌐 Hold 11 different currencies in one account
promotions.description: ZA Bank's multi-currency savings account allows customers to hold 11 different currencies, including HKD, CNY, USD, GBP, SGD, EUR, CAD, AUD, JPY, NZD, and CHF. Exchange currencies 24/7 at your preferred rates.

promotions.title: Free Cash Withdrawals at Visa ATMs
promotions.highlight: 💳 Free cash withdrawals at over 3,000 Visa ATMs in Hong Kong
promotions.description: ZA Card holders can withdraw cash for free at over 3,000 Visa ATMs across Hong Kong. No withdrawal fees charged by ZA Bank when using your ZA Card at these ATMs.

promotions.title: Free Crypto Trading Platform Fee for New Customers
promotions.highlight: ₿ $0 platform fee for crypto trading in first 90 days
promotions.description: New customers can enjoy $0 platform fee for cryptocurrency trading during the first 90 days after opening their account. Trade directly with HKD or USD deposits, with 24/7 access to crypto markets.
promotions.quota: New customers only, for first 90 days

promotions.title: Custom Card Number Selection
promotions.highlight: 🔢 Choose the last 6 digits of your card number
promotions.description: ZA Bank is the first in Hong Kong to allow customers to choose the last 6 digits that appear on their ZA Card. This unique feature lets you personalize your debit card with memorable numbers.

promotions.title: Free Instant FPS Transfers
promotions.highlight: ⚡ Zero fees for instant transfers between banks
promotions.description: ZA Bank offers free instant cross-bank transfers via FPS. Send and receive funds in HKD or CNY using just a mobile phone number, with no transaction fees.

promotions.title: Zero Fee SWIFT International Transfers
promotions.highlight: 🌐 Free real-time transfers between Hong Kong and Mainland China
promotions.description: Send money between Mainland China and Hong Kong in real-time with ZA Bank's Cross-Border Payment Connect service. No handling fees for transfers in either direction.

promotions.title: Hong Kong Stock Trading Commission-Free Promotion
promotions.highlight: 💹 Zero commission and custody fees for Hong Kong stocks
promotions.description: Trade Hong Kong stocks with 0 brokerage commission, 0 custody fees, and platform fees as low as HKD 18 per transaction. Available for various securities including stocks, ETFs, virtual asset ETFs, bull/bear contracts and warrants.
promotions.quota: All customers with stock trading services

promotions.title: ZA Card PowerDraw
promotions.highlight: 🎁 Win up to 200% rebate on eligible transactions
promotions.description: ZA Card holders can participate in PowerDraw for a chance to win up to 200% rebate on their purchases. Simply make purchases with ZA Card to qualify for PowerDraw entries.
promotions.cost: Must make purchases with ZA Card

promotions.title: Fast Loan Approval
promotions.highlight: ⏱️ Get loan approval results in as fast as 90 seconds
promotions.description: ZA Bank offers fast loan approval with results available in as fast as 90 seconds. Loan amounts up to HKD 1,000,000 with annualized percentage rates as low as 1.30%.

promotions.title: New Stock Trading Customer Cash Rewards
promotions.highlight: 💵 Up to HKD 1,500 in cash rewards for new stock traders
promotions.description: New users can receive up to HKD 500 in cash rewards for opening an account, plus up to HKD 1,000 in cash rebates for buying stocks. This offer is specifically for Hong Kong stock trading customers.
promotions.cost: Must buy stocks to qualify for portion of rewards

promotions.title: 20% p.a. HKD Time Deposit for Meeting Deposit Requirement
promotions.highlight: 💹 New users can enjoy 20% p.a. interest rate on 7-day HKD time deposits
promotions.description: New customers referred through the referral program can receive a +19.9% p.a. 7-day HKD time deposit interest rate bonus coupon, which combined with the base rate offers a total of 20% p.a. interest rate. Additional coupons can be earned by meeting specified requirements.
promotions.cost: Must be referred through program and meet deposit requirements

promotions.title: Fund Position Rebate Vouchers for New Customers
promotions.highlight: 🧾 Receive HKD 800 in fund position rebate vouchers
promotions.description: New customers can receive fund position rebate vouchers worth HKD 800 (including one HKD 780 voucher and one HKD 20 voucher). These vouchers are valid for 30 days after receipt and can be used to offset fund investment costs.
promotions.quota: New customers who open accounts with referral codes

promotions.title: Currency Exchange Discount Voucher
promotions.highlight: 💱 Receive HKD 126 currency exchange discount voucher
promotions.description: New customers can receive a HKD 126 currency exchange discount voucher valid for 30 days after receipt. This voucher can be used to reduce the cost of currency exchange transactions within ZA Bank.
promotions.quota: New customers who open accounts with referral codes

promotions.title: ZA Card No Annual Fee
promotions.highlight: 💳 No annual fees or hidden charges on ZA Card
promotions.description: ZA Bank's Visa debit card comes with no annual fees or hidden charges, providing a cost-effective payment solution. The card supports Apple Pay and Google Pay for convenient digital payments.

promotions.title: ZA Bank 24/7 Banking Service
promotions.highlight: ⏰ 24/7 banking services always available, no matter the time of day
promotions.description: ZA Bank provides around-the-clock banking services with 24x7 customer service support. Users can access banking features including deposits, transfers, and foreign exchange at any time without time restrictions.

promotions.title: Group Lai See Feature
promotions.highlight: 🧧 Send Group Lai See with one tap without entering recipients individually
promotions.description: Users can distribute Lai See (red packets) to groups with a single tap, eliminating the need to enter recipients individually. This convenient feature simplifies the traditional practice of sending red packets during holidays and special occasions.

promotions.title: ZA Bank x Wise Express Remittance
promotions.highlight: 🚀 HKD payments with express remittance by Wise arrive faster than standard transfers
promotions.description: ZA Bank partners with Wise to provide express remittance services, allowing HKD payments to arrive faster than standard international transfers. This service enables quicker cross-border payments for users.

promotions.title: Insurance in 3 Minutes
promotions.highlight: 🛡️ Get insured in as fast as 3 minutes via your smartphone
promotions.description: In partnership with ZA Insure, users can complete insurance applications in as little as 3 minutes via smartphone. Coverage options include life insurance, critical illness insurance, and Voluntary Health Insurance Scheme (VHIS).

promotions.title: Hong Kong Stock Trading Cashback
promotions.highlight: 💰 Get up to HKD 1,500 when opening an account and trading Hong Kong stocks
promotions.description: New users can receive up to HKD 500 cash rewards for opening an account and up to HKD 1,000 cash rebate when buying stocks. The promotion offers significant cash incentives for new stock trading customers.
